title: stachys inflata
intro: Stachys inflata, also known as Inflated Betony, is a perennial plant in the mint family that is native to Europe and western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Stachys inflata include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality. Stachys inflata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies.
